The '''Tower''' was a modified [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] owned by the [[Bimm/Legends|Bimm]] Gun-Runner [[Rycar Ryjerd/Legends|Rycar Ryjerd]].

The crew consisted of Rycar and three other Bimms.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Running the Sisar|book=Secrets of the Sisar Run}} {{1st}}
